reviews.review_description: The player model is very basic, the map looks bad, the cosmetics are very simple or stolen, and the limited cosmetics room removed all of my cosmetics. Only fun part is climbing on the walls but everything else is terrible. Making a V2 would probably be best to actually get this game popular. I see a gleam of potential here.

developer_response.body: We are working on V2 as well as patching the bug that removed your cosmetics.

reviews.review_description: The way they made the Gorilla Tag Movement is amazing!

developer_response.body: We Work hard and that makes me happy that you say that!
